title: Slow Your Flint
description: My take on flint tools for the 'Slow Your Roll' mod.
body:
**As seen in the [Sticks n' Stones](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mc-sns) modpack!**

A very simple texture pack intended for the '[Slow Your Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/slow-your-roll)' mod, which changes the flint tools to look much more primitive. Also works for [Divergent Progression](https://modrinth.com/mod/divergent-progression)!

This pack also changes the names of some items to fit there new look, like the "**Flint Sword**" now being a "**Flint Shiv**", or the "**Flint Axe**" becoming the "**Flint Hatchet**".

***!! DO NOT REUPLOAD ANY OF MY RESOURCE PACKS ANYWHERE !!***

**Please, if you have any spare..*anything*, [consider buying me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/kckarnige), or a [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/kckarnige)!**
